since_last: 66% of 89 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +4.81%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 66% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.18% · BTC +2.43% · Gold +1.75% · Nasdaq100 -1.08%. 66% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +4.81%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +4.81%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -3.75%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRWD is the standout at +10.83%
cards.body: Leaders: CRWD +10.83%, META +9.83%, APP +9.70%, PLTR +8.82%, PATH +8.42%. Laggards: KLAC -10.65%, LRCX -9.94%, TER -9.94%, AMAT -9.43%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.22% at $160.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
